value.name: incipit
value.summary: Template-driven CLI that transforms structured resume data into polished PDF, DOCX, HTML, LaTeX, and Markdown formats, with pluggable templates and AI-powered resume review and optimization.

value.name: mnemonist
value.summary: Local-first Rust CLI for AI agent memory, featuring cognitive verbs, plain-markdown memories, local candle embeddings, and HNSW semantic search for memory and code.

value.name: saige
value.summary: Unified Go SDK, CLI, and MCP server for streaming AI agents, knowledge graphs, and RAG pipelines, integrating major AI providers behind a single interface.

value.name: flappy-bird
value.summary: Flappy Bird clone built with JavaFX and Java 21, showcasing data-oriented design and automated native builds for Linux, macOS, and Windows.

value.name: chess-cli
value.summary: Fully playable chess game with a command-line interface in Python, ideal for exploring game logic and chess AI algorithms.

value.name: agentspec
value.summary: Universal agent skill and sub-agent manager with a terminal user interface, built in Rust for orchestrating complex agent workflows.

value.name: teasr
value.summary: Single Rust binary for capturing showcase screenshots and GIFs from web apps, desktop, and terminal, with no runtime dependencies.

value.name: linear-gp
value.summary: Production-grade Rust framework for Linear Genetic Programming research, supporting modular architecture, Q-Learning, and automated hyperparameter optimization.

value.name: lepus-classifier
value.summary: CNN research project investigating optimal image classification architectures for small datasets, highlighting data quantity as the key bottleneck in deep learning.

value.name: dotfiles
value.summary: Cross-platform dotfiles managed by Chezmoi, with one-command bootstrap for macOS and Linux, integrating Neovim, Tmux, Zsh, and AI agent skills.

value.name: md-classifier
value.summary: Deep learning system combining transformers and CNNs to classify diseases from patient-described symptoms, achieving high recall with semantic embeddings.

value.name: duraturo
value.summary: Go library for durable execution, enabling function wrapping with ledgers, workers, and queues over existing storage.

value.name: lazyspeak.nvim
value.summary: Voice-driven coding extension for Neovim, allowing spoken intent to drive editor actions.

value.name: generative-artifact-protocol
value.summary: Open standard for token-efficient artifact updates and streaming, featuring a Go apply engine and evaluation CLI.

value.name: github-insights
value.summary: AI-powered GitHub profile metrics with SVG visualizations, project classification, and README generation, available as CLI, npm package, and GitHub Action.

value.name: gymnasia
value.summary: Pure Rust implementations of OpenAI Gymnasium environments for reinforcement learning research.

value.name: urmzd.com
value.summary: Personal website, blog, and research portfolio built with Astro, React, and Three.js.

value.name: fsrc
value.summary: CLI, Rust crate, and GitHub Action for embedding source files into any text file using comment markers.

value.name: broadcast
value.summary: CLI tool for turning a blog post into platform-native content for X Articles and LinkedIn posts.

value.name: dispatch
value.summary: Beta control plane for agent execution nodes, scaling sandboxed agents with metrics and NGAC policy enforcement.

value.name: rlgp-thesis
value.summary: Bachelor's thesis on Reinforced Linear Genetic Programming, presented in TeX.

value.name: glassbox-lm
value.summary: Observable language models where every hidden state is a readable word distribution, with a CLI for tracing, causal probing, and faithfulness coverage.

value.name: lightning-kfold
value.summary: Drop-in stratified K-fold cross-validation with ensemble voting for PyTorch Lightning.

value.name: zoro
value.summary: Privacy-first AI research agent with a persistent knowledge graph, running all inference locally.

value.name: oag
value.summary: OpenAPI 3.x code generator for TypeScript, React/SWR, and FastAPI, using customizable Jinja2 template packs and supporting SSE streaming.

value.name: sr
value.summary: Release engineering CLI providing automated semantic versioning from conventional commits in a single static binary.

value.name: languide
value.summary: Scenario-based language guides built from markdown, generating PDFs with full Unicode and CJK support.

value.name: urmzd
value.summary: GitHub profile README with auto-generated metrics, project spotlights, and portfolio tables, regenerated by github-insights.

value.name: streamsafe
value.summary: Type-safe async pipeline framework for data processing in Rust.

value.name: zigbee-skill
value.summary: AI-native smart home skill enabling direct Zigbee device control by AI agents, with no cloud or hub required.

value.name: cypress-name-too-long-mre
value.summary: Minimal reproduction example for a Cypress issue, containing basic JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.

value.name: barter-trader
value.summary: Community-focused Android trading app using Clean Architecture and MVVM for peer-to-peer item exchanges.

preamble.value: I design and build full-stack AI systems from scratch—think streaming agent SDKs (saige) and local-first agent memory (mnemonist)—using Rust, Go, and TypeScript to push what agents can do, how they remember, and how easily they plug in.
